sn35.150:1.1: "Nibbānasappāyaṁ vo, bhikkhave, paṭipadāṁ desessāmi. Taṁ suṇātha … pe … katamā ca sā, bhikkhave, nibbānasappāyā paṭipadā? Taṁ kiṁ maññatha, bhikkhave, cakkhu niccaṁ vā aniccaṁ vā"ti?
sn35.150:15.1: "Evaṁ passaṁ, bhikkhave, sutavā ariyasāvako cakkhusmimpi nibbindati, rūpesupi nibbindati, cakkhuviññāṇepi nibbindati, cakkhusamphassepi nibbindati … pe … yampidaṁ manosamphassapaccayā uppajjati vedayitaṁ sukhaṁ vā dukkhaṁ vā adukkhamasukhaṁ vā tasmimpi nibbindati. Nibbindaṁ virajjati; virāgā vimuccati … pe … nāparaṁ itthattāyāti pajānāti.
sn35.150:15.2: Ayaṁ kho sā, bhikkhave, nibbānasappāyā paṭipadā"ti.
